modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need shortcut for sharing OneNote notes with others

full_description_text:  
I am looking for a specific shortcut in OneNote that allows me to share my notes with other people. While using OneNote, I realized that I don't know the exact key combination or method to quickly share my notes. It would be really helpful to have this shortcut so I can efficiently collaborate with others. If anyone has this information, please let me know.
